title: Constituent-impact outcome tracking (cases to outcomes; duty/compliance improvements)
context: Elyos measures outcomes, not vanity metrics. Public-Official-Guide tracks constituent-impact outcomes: cases moved to resolution, duty/compliance improvements (e.g., a flagged COI disclosed, a records-retention gap fixed). Outcome data is linked to casework records and logged with the official's confirmation. The outcome dashboard surfaces cases resolved and duty/compliance improvements -- not DAU or session counts. This closes the beneficiary loop that makes the deed real.
objective: Implement constituent-impact outcome tracking that links casework records to outcomes (cases resolved, duty/compliance improvements) with official confirmation, and surfaces an outcome dashboard (not engagement metrics).
acceptanceCriteria: Tracks outcomes linked to casework cases: issue resolved, duty compliance improvement (e.g., COI disclosed, retention gap fixed), or unresolved with reason
Outcomes logged with the official's confirmation (not auto-generated)
Outcome dashboard surfaces: cases moved to resolution, documented duty/compliance improvements, guardrail-audit status -- not DAU or session counts
Outcome records are privacy-preserving (minimal constituent data; no political fields)
output: A merged PR implementing constituent-impact outcome tracking (cases to outcomes, duty/compliance improvements, official confirmation) and an outcome dashboard surfacing civic metrics, not engagement metrics.
